originalAlarm.description: Value stored to 'm_has_modinfo' is never read

reasoning: 5275b1e49f6.c L18: m_has_modinfo dead store. The value assigned to m_has_modinfo at L18 is never subsequently read. PC=CONFIG_FEATURE_INSMOD_VERSION_CHECKING=T correctly constrains when this code exists. No library macros (clean PRODUCT analysis). New bug. Consistent with TRANSFORMATION_39 and TRANSFORMATION_86 (TRUE_NEW_OVER with library macros); PRODUCT version is correctly constrained.
